payload.answer: I’m seeing a low-confidence, ambiguous note mentioning “Sam,” and cloud escalation is disabled. Can you clarify what the “Sam” note refers to (e.g., full name, context, what action is needed, and any relevant details/attachments)?

entity_resolution.reason: The input only states that model confidence is low and Sam note is ambiguous; no specific, durable fact about Sam or the escalation target is provided.

details: Insufficient information due to ambiguity (“Sam” not uniquely identified) and low model confidence.
No cloud escalation available to resolve ambiguity externally.

repair_options: Provide the exact text of the Sam note
Specify who “Sam” is (name/ID/role) and the relevant project/team
Describe the desired outcome (e.g., update CRM, create ticket, notify a channel) and deadline
Include any logs/links/error messages that triggered the note
